narrative:
Bloomingburg (precinct in Fayette County) has 415 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.1 percentage points.
